name: The Grossman Group
why: Leadership communication consultancy that specializes in executive town halls, internal announcements, and employee-facing events for Fortune 500 companies — a direct buyer of broadcast/webcast infrastructure.

name: Gagen MacDonald
why: Employee engagement and organizational communications firm known for producing large-scale internal events, leadership webcasts, and hybrid town halls for enterprise clients.

name: Ketchum

name: Porter Novelli
